name: 05_raw_above_upper_clamp
description: Raw value is less negative than VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX (closer to zero); clamp pins it at the ceiling of -0.5. The 'shallow drop never arms shallower than -0.5' rule.
derivation: raw = -(0.1 * 1.0) = -0.1. min(-0.5, -0.1) = -0.5. max(-3.0, -0.5) = -0.5. Clamped at upper bound VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX because -0.1 > -0.5.
